name: [Tutorial] - The book of KamiDa
description:
1. Prelude

Welcome!
I'm KamiDa and i want to build/write not just a story, but an actual experience. To fully enjoy my bots, you need to do some work yourself. My bots are about long open world fantasy adventure with realism but also a distinct touch of "Isekai" flavored anime. There are Creatures to defeat, things to craft, levels to gain, skills to unlock and treasures just waiting to be found without pressure from a "great evil". You will meet new characters with whom you can adventure with who may or may not agree with your actions. You may even experience a "game over" if you are not careful but you won't find gore, meaningless cruelty or nudity.
Interested? Then let me tell you how things go~

2. Your Persona

To start, you will probably need to create a new persona because YOU need to keep track of things LLMs cannot. See it like this: My account is the game/book, the bots are levels/scenarios and your persona? That's your safe-file.
Create a new persona, keep it super simple! You'll need the following information in it:
Write something very short, a brief physical description if you want, pronounces and who/what you are. As an example:
Female (She/her), slicked back long teal hair, teal eyes, forked tongue, short black oni-horns, black kunoichi uniform, red scarf, pale white skin.
Race: Oni
Class: Kunoichi / Ninja
Your status (Just copy paste this in):
Level: 1, EXP: 0/100, HP: 50/50, MP: 20/20, Gold: 100
You will need to track progression throughout your role plays manually.

3. Role play

A bot will start similar as every other bot you've probably played so far. There is you, a character and a world. The character will have certain goals of their own, Levels, skills, equipment etc.
You can go train/practive, hunt, craft, get drunk somewhere, build a house, join a guild, adventure or just enjoy a peaceful life. You have HP, if that drops to 0? You're dead, but don't worry too much about it, it is just part of a living breathing world and you can (re-)start any roleplay with your (new or) current stats.

4. What YOU need to do

Levelups! When you level up, you get a new random skill you need to add to your persona. As an exmaple:
New Skill Unlocked: Flame Whip (4-6 DMG, 7 MP) - Lashes out with a burning tendril of fire that can strike multiple close-range targets.
Copy the skill to your persona so you can preserve it through the role play and other bots. Same goes for equipment wich would look like this:
Gloaming Fang Dagger (6-9 Damage) - A curved blade forged from darkened
creator: KamiDa
